acceptance_criteria: A tx may be staged for produce_block only when ready_queue, pending metadata, current pending slot, live payload, and non-dropped location all point to the same tx.

test_evidence.command: cargo test -p verified-core --test p0_safety && cargo test -p ic-evm-gateway replacement_old_tx_is_not_staged_or_included
test_evidence.test_name: verified-core staging pure tests plus gateway replacement stale-tx exclusion evidence
